responsibilities: Develop and implement data governance policies and standards that ensure data quality and consistency
Establish data stewardship processes that assign clear ownership and accountability for critical data assets
Build and maintain a centralized data catalog that documents data definitions, lineage, and ownership
Conduct data quality assessments and implement remediation plans to address identified data issues
Ensure organizational compliance with data privacy regulations such as GDPR and CCPA across all data assets
Define and enforce master data management standards to maintain a single source of truth for key entities
Collaborate with data engineering and IT teams to implement data lineage tracking across the data lifecycle
Train business and technical teams on data governance policies, tools, and best practices
Monitor and report on data governance KPIs, including data quality scores and policy compliance rates
Lead cross-functional governance councils to resolve data ownership conflicts and prioritize remediation efforts
